zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Beauchamp於1242年之前出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素時，他的父親William de Beauchamp27歲，母親Isabel Mauduit27歲。他於1280年之前與Alice de Tosny結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1303年2月16日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Beauchamp于1242年之前出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素时，他的父亲William de Beauchamp27岁，母亲Isabel Mauduit27岁。他于1280年之前与Alice de Tosny结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1303年2月16日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾哈爾方特，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Beachum
meanings: Altered form of English   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: English:
possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Beauchamp was born before 1242, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Beauchamp, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Mauduit, was 27. He married Alice de Tosny before 1280. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 16 February 1303, in Chalfont, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Beauchamp est né avant 1242, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Beauchamp, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Mauduit, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Tosny avant 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 février 1303, à Chalfont, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Beauchamp vor 1242 in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Beauchamp 27 und seine Mutter Isabel Mauduit 27. Er hat vor 1280 Alice de Tosny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Februar 1303 in Chalfont, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Beauchamp è nato il prima del 1242 nel Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Beauchamp, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Mauduit, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Tosny prima del 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1303, nel Chalfont, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Beauchampが1242年以前にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルで生まれた時，父William de Beauchampは27歳，母Isabel Mauduitは27歳であった。1280年以前にAlice de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1303年2月16日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチャルフォントで死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Beauchamp(이)가 1242년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Beauchamp(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Mauduit(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1280년 이전 Alice de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 2월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 차폰트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Alice de Tosny antes 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Beauchamp родился перед 1242 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Beauchamp было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Mauduit, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Tosny перед 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 февраля 1303 г. в местности халфонт, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.
